prompt: A hyper-realistic photorealistic portrait of a beautiful young Korean woman with smooth skin, shoulder-length black hair with soft bangs, and a gentle smile. She is leaning casually against the interior wall of a modern train, looking directly into the camera. She is wearing a minimal beige crewneck cotton t-shirt tucked into a high-waisted light-wash blue denim midi skirt. Her casual look is completed with white crew socks and clean white platform sneakers. She is standing next to a large train window showing a blurred rural landscape outside under soft daylight. The atmosphere is warm, aesthetic, and peaceful. Shot with a 35mm lens, natural lighting, cinematic composition, sharp focus, 8k resolution, highly detailed.
promptEn: A hyper-realistic photorealistic portrait of a beautiful young Korean woman with smooth skin, shoulder-length black hair with soft bangs, and a gentle smile. She is leaning casually against the interior wall of a modern train, looking directly into the camera. She is wearing a minimal beige crewneck cotton t-shirt tucked into a high-waisted light-wash blue denim midi skirt. Her casual look is completed with white crew socks and clean white platform sneakers. She is standing next to a large train window showing a blurred rural landscape outside under soft daylight. The atmosphere is warm, aesthetic, and peaceful. Shot with a 35mm lens, natural lighting, cinematic composition, sharp focus, 8k resolution, highly detailed.
promptZh: 一张超写实的摄影级肖像，主角是 一位美丽的年轻韩国女性，皮肤细腻，留着齐肩黑发和柔和的刘海，面带温柔的微笑。她随意地倚靠在 现代列车的内壁 上，直视镜头。她穿着 简约的米色圆领棉质 T 恤，下摆塞进高腰浅蓝色牛仔中长裙中。她休闲的造型搭配了白色中筒袜和干净的白色厚底运动鞋。她站在一扇巨大的列车窗旁，窗外是柔和日光下模糊的乡村景观。氛围温暖、美观且宁静。使用 35mm 镜头拍摄，自然光，电影级构图，焦点清晰，8k 分辨率，细节丰富。
